title: elaeocarpus jackianus
intro: Elaeocarpus jackianus, also known as the Malay Meranti, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus jackianus include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally or used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
